――娼館の利用客と酒を求める飲食客で賑わう酒場。<br>その一角に、どこか不穏な:
The tavern was crowded with brothel patrons and drinkers. In one
corner, an uneasy atmosphere hung.
おいおい、絶対にヤバいだろ、あの女。<br>絡まれる前に帰ろうぜ……:
Whoa, that woman's definitely trouble. Let's get out of here before
she picks a fight.
ヤバい女……？<br>誰が飲んでるんだ？: A dangerous woman...? Who's that drinking?
様子を見てみると、周囲にぽっかりとスペースの空いたカウンター席で<br>見覚えの:
I looked and saw a familiar woman at the counter, alone in a wide
empty space, emptying her glass.
っく、っく……ぷはぁぁぁ……！<br>ほんっとうにあの横着司令官は……隙あらば仕:
Glug, glug... *puff*...! That lazy Commander really... he takes any
chance to slack off!
げ、ライム……！？<br>しかもなんか、俺の愚痴を言ってないか……？: Gah! Lime...! And she's bitching about me!
なのにいざって時はどっしり構えて、レイゼリア様の信頼もあって……！<br>その癖:
But when it counts, he's calm and has Lady Reyzeria's trust...! Yet he
doesn't realize the honor she gives him by relying on him.
どうしてレイゼリア様はわたくしを頼ってくれないのぉっ！<br>もっと頼ってぇ、構:
Why won't Lady Reyzeria rely on me! I want her to rely on me, pay
attention to me, dote on me...
うわあ……とんでもなく見苦しい……。<br>こりゃ止めてやるのが司令官の情け、か:
Geez... this is just pathetic... I suppose it's the Commander's kindness
to stop this...
おーい、ライムー？<br>酒はほどほどにしておけよー？: Hey, Lime? You should take it easy on the booze, okay?
しれーかーん！？ なんであなたがいるのっ！<br>来るならレイゼリア様でしょ～っ:
Commander! Why are you here! If you were going to come, it
should've been Lady Reyzeria!
そこは俺で良かったと思えよ。<br>こんな姿をレイゼリアに見られたらどうする気だ:
You should be thankful it's me. What would you do if Lady Reyzeria
saw you like this?
うるっさいのよ！ 構うんじゃないわ！<br>あなたみたいな鈍感唐変木、だいっきら: Shut up! Don't bother me! I hate blockheads like you!
好き嫌いはおいといて、酒はその辺にしとこうな？<br>それか、もうちょっといい飲:
Forget about whether you like me or not and call it quits on the
drinking, okay? Or at least drink more responsibly.
なーんで、だいっきらいなあなたのいうこと聞かなきゃいけないのー？<br>いうこと:
Why should I listen to someone I hate so much? If you want me to
listen, you drink too!
うわあ……面倒くせえ、この酔っぱらい……<br>はいはい、大嫌いな俺で悪いけど１:
Geez... you're such a pain, you drunk... Fine, fine, sorry I'm the one
you hate, but I'll have one with you.
あのねえ、今日もレイゼリア様があなたの話をしたのよ！<br>口調だけで、信頼して:
You know, Lady Reyzeria talked about you again today! Just from her
tone, you can tell she really trusts you!
あなたが無能司令官だったらお諌めもするのにぃっ！<br>あなたも使える時は使える:
If you were an incompetent commander, I could advise her against
you! But you're actually capable when it counts, so you're a handful!
はいはい、分かった分かった。<br>ほら、ついでやるから落ち着け……――: Yeah, yeah, I get it. Here, I'll have one with you, so calm down...
レイゼリア様ぁ……わたくし、もっとお役に立ちますからぁ……: Lady Reyzeria... I'll be more useful to you...
はあ……やれやれ、なんとか連れて帰れたか。<br>俺は戻るから、ゆっくり寝ろよ。:
*sigh*... Well, I barely got you home. I'm heading back now, so get
some good sleep.
ん……何よ、帰る気？<br>襲わないわけー？:
Mmm... What, you're going back? You're not gonna make a move on
me?
わたくしを襲わないのか、って聞いてるんですー。<br>なーに？ 野暮な鈍感、唐変:
I'm asking if you're not gonna make a move on me. What's the matter?
You a tactless, thick-headed blockhead and a coward to boot?
この酔っ払いめ……ったく、襲うわけないだろ。酔って正常じゃないお前に<br>欲情:
You drunkard... no way I'd take advantage. I'm not that desperate. If
you're sober, I'd fuck you anytime.
ふん……根性なし。<br>やっぱり男なんてみんな大したことないじゃない。: *Hmph*... coward. As expected, men are all worthless.
っ……こっちが紳士でいてやってるのに、俺を男として否定するわけか。<br>分かっ:
*Tch*... I'm trying to be a gentleman, and you're going to deny my
manhood? Fine. If that's how it is, I'll show you what kind of man I am!
ええ、きなさいよ。<br>その程度でわたくしが怯えると思ったら大間違いだから！:
Yes, bring it on. If you think I'll be scared by that, you're sorely
mistaken!
